title: POST /api/v1/statuses: full post creation with validation
description:
Create a post from an authenticated client. Accept: status (text, max config.limits.max_post_chars), visibility (public/unlisted/private/direct), sensitive (bool), spoiler_text, in_reply_to_id (validated to exist), language (BCP-47), media_ids (validated to belong to authed account and not already attached). Run content through rendering pipeline (markdown, mentions, hashtags). Insert into posts table. Enqueue outbound activity. Return Status object.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to POST test statuses to mastodon.social and document every field in the response Status object as the oracle. Spawn a parallel subagent to implement input validation.

Test discipline:
- Create simple text post → response Status shape matches mastodon.social oracle
- Create post over max_post_chars → 422 with error message
- Create post with invalid in_reply_to_id → 422
- Create post with media_ids belonging to different account → 422
- Create public post → ap_id and url are correct URLs
- Status.id is a quoted string

Defensive programming:
- Wrap post creation + mention row creation + hashtag row creation in a single DB transaction
- media_ids: verify each media.account_id = authed account AND media.post_id IS NULL
- language: validate as BCP-47 tag if provided (don't accept 'english', only 'en')
- visibility: reject any value not in {public, unlisted, private, direct}
acceptance_criteria: Post created atomically; over-length post rejected with 422; wrong account's media rejected; Status.id is quoted string; response matches mastodon.social shape
